faqs.question: What pests are most common in Croton-on-Hudson homes?
faqs.answer: Croton-on-Hudson residents commonly encounter ants, carpenter ants, spiders, roaches, mice, stink bugs, and occasional invaders like centipedes and silverfish. The proximity to wooded areas and the Hudson River creates ideal conditions for pest activity, particularly during spring and fall. Our general pest control service targets all these common pests with comprehensive interior and exterior treatments.
